1746240.name: An Embered Expedition
1746240.description:
Embark on an Elite Explorer's mission to the Frozen Isle to rescue the previous search party who haven't been heard from in a while.
Unfortunately Dina the Dragon gets shipwrecked on the way, losing both her teammate; Felix, and boat to boot. When she finally wakes up, it's all up to you to plot out and explore the wintry tundra to reconnect with her friends and get home.



Undertake the expedition however you like as a fire breathing dragon is very unlikely to freeze. Light Bonpyres across the island and Dina will learn new fire based abilities. Utilise the power of fire to get around the island quicker and find unlit braziers. Lighting them increases Dina's fire capacity and they become a checkpoint to instantly refill her fire reserves.

Key Features

  • Explore a snow covered island at your own pace finding friends and Bonpyres on your journey
  • Lighting braziers and bonpyres expands Dina's movement abilities. Sprint, hover and firejump to new locations and traverse previous areas easier!
  • A wordless game that only uses icons for menus and dialogue.
  • Buy hats for Dina to keep her scaley head warm
